description: Mock application packet: a Chinese-national foreign engineer ('Yuan') employed by a Korean company since 2023-01-01, qualifying for the Restriction of Special Taxation Act's 50% tax reduction for foreign engineers, filing the year-end tax settlement income deduction & tax credit report for a single workplace with a spouse and one child as dependents. Wage, national pension premium, national health insurance premium, and credit card spending figures are transcribed verbatim from the NTS guide's own worked example ('Case 5. A foreign engineer's year-end tax settlement', 2025 Easy Guide for Foreigners' Year-end Tax Settlement, p.151) — Yuan/Amy/Charlie are the guide's own illustrative names, not real persons. Administrative values the calculation-only worked example does not state (registration numbers, business registration number, exemption expiration date, submission dates, declaration date) are synthesized illustrative values, flagged inline, consistent with this registry's practice for calculation-example-derived packets.
